audio_identity.overall_style: Arcade carnival-style shooting game music with digitized drum samples
distinctive_elements: Key transposition from C to C# (from VS arcade versions)
influences: VS arcade versions of Balloon Fight and Duck Hunt

notes: Documentation provides limited audio detail. Key information extracted: composer (Hirokazu Tanaka), high scores theme key (C#), use of digitized drum samples, and that music was remixed from VS arcade versions. No specific tempo, time signatures, chord progressions, or SFX characteristics are documented. Game consists of four gameplay areas (Balloon Saloon, Flying Saucers, Window Pains, Fun Follies) but audio variations per area are not documented.
